use_cases: Displaying product features or highlights with a frosted glass visual effect
Showcasing pricing tiers with elegant translucent backgrounds
Creating modern user profile or settings panels
Building overlay content cards with depth and layering
Designing dashboard widgets with subtle transparency effects
ai_summary: A glass-morphism card component with translucent, frosted-glass styling and blur effects. Features clean minimal design with potential gradient or border treatments. Part of the Molecule Lab component collection, typically used for displaying content with a modern, layered aesthetic. Includes demo showcasing the card as a standalone container with centered content display.
